channel.title: ClawDeck Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.1.3
item.description:
### Fixed
- **Gateway handshake rejected** — Changed `client.id` from `clawdbot-macos` to `gateway-client` to match the gateway protocol schema's allowed client IDs. Fixes connection failures with gateway 2026.3.13+.
- **Xcode project version** — Bumped `MARKETING_VERSION` to 1.1.3.
